description: The preservation of thought through visible marks, transforming ephemeral speech into enduring form. Writing encompasses the sacred act of recording, the bridge between minds across time, the careful craft of symbol-making, and the recognition that written words carry responsibility.
rationale: The word 'themi' combines deliberate 'the' with bright 'mi'. Using a fricative digraph, this pairing captures writing as deliberate thought made bright and visible on the page.
